title: NDR / Network Security Engine — Zero Trust Scoring & Live Flow Analysis
description: network_security.py implements 7 integrated capabilities including network asset discovery, segmentation analysis, firewall rule audit, DNS security, TLS monitoring, flow analysis, and Zero Trust scoring. test_network_analyzer.py validates zone models and flow baselines. Gap: flow analysis computes beaconing/lateral-movement alerts from ingested flows but does not consume live netflow/pcap data — ingestion is manual.
missing: Netflow ingestion listener: UDP listener on port 2055 (NetFlow v9/IPFIX) that decodes flow records and inserts into network_security.db in real time
DNS security live monitoring: pcap-based DNS packet capture using scapy or pyshark to detect DGA/tunneling patterns in real traffic
Zero Trust score → access decision: when zero_trust_score drops below threshold, call access_control_engine to revoke or restrict affected sessions
